effects.label: Catastrophic Failure
effects.summary: A failed check that misses by a large margin can count as more than one failure.
effects.implementationNote: GM-confirmed roll previews add the extra failure before the GM accepts the suggested result.

effects.label: Restricted Skills
effects.summary: Only listed skills count automatically; other approaches require GM review.
effects.implementationNote: The roll adapter only auto-offers listed skills. The effect resolver also downgrades unlisted rolls to GM review if they reach the engine.

effects.label: Recovery
effects.summary: Allows the GM to remove accumulated failures when the challenge rules allow recovery.
effects.implementationNote: Implemented as a GM-facing Recover Failure tracker action. It does not infer whether a player qualifies automatically.

effects.label: Second Effort
effects.summary: Records an allowed additional attempt or retry opportunity.
effects.implementationNote: Implemented as a GM-facing history action only. It does not reroll dice or spend resources automatically.

effects.label: Timed Challenge
effects.summary: The challenge has a round, turn, or abstract pressure track.
effects.implementationNote: Implemented as a GM-adjusted countdown. It can optionally mark the challenge failed when remaining reaches zero.

effects.label: Changing Objectives
effects.summary: The list of useful skills, DCs, or goals can shift as the scene changes.
effects.implementationNote: Represent as editable GM metadata until objective transitions are modeled.

effects.label: Last Resort
effects.summary: A reroll/rescue hook tied to a failing challenge state.
effects.implementationNote: Reserved for Phase 3.5E because it belongs to Skill Challenge feat/reaction handling.
